title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BigBasket - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BigBasket - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
BigBasket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BigBasket:
BigBasket is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket!
